config.task: Add Razorpay payment integration to ~/Desktop/Taxly/backend/main.py. Add POST /sessions/{session_id}/pay endpoint that creates a Razorpay order (amount 49900 paise for domestic, 99900 for NRI). Add POST /razorpay/webhook endpoint that verifies signature and updates session payment_status to paid in Supabase. Gate the existing /generate-xml endpoint, return HTTP 402 if payment_status != paid. Use env vars RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET. Install razorpay Python package. Write 3 pytest tests mocking Razorpay API.

Add phone OTP auth to ~/Desktop/Taxly/backend/main.py. Add POST /auth/send-otp endpoint that calls MSG91 API with phone number. Add POST /auth/verify-otp endpoint that verifies code, creates or fetches user row in Supabase users table (id UUID, phone TEXT, created_at). Return JWT token on success. Use env vars MSG91_AUTH_KEY, MSG91_TEMPLATE_ID, JWT_SECRET. Install python-jose and httpx. Write 3 pytest tests mocking MSG91.

Add session resume to ~/Desktop/Taxly/frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.jsx. On mount, call GET /sessions/{sessionId}. If session exists and status=in_progress and messages.length > 0, restore the messages array into state and show them in chat. If status=complete, redirect to /summary/{sessionId}. Show a toast "Welcome back! Continuing where you left off." when restoring. Handle 404 gracefully by starting fresh.

Add receipt email to ~/Desktop/Taxly/backend/main.py. After Razorpay webhook confirms payment, call Resend API to send email to user. Email subject: Your ITR XML is ready - Taxly. Body: plain text with user name, assessment year, amount paid, and XML attached as taxly_itr_2025-26.xml. Use env var RESEND_API_KEY. Install resend Python package. Write 2 pytest tests mocking Resend.
